must_detect.matched_text: This notice is issued under the Thai PDPA and the listed-issuer guidance of the Office of Capital Markets Oversight (OCMO‑TH) for immediate disclosure; see https://ir.siamtrident.example/notice?doc=OCMO-TH%2F2569%2FIR-17.

Finance folder “Project mango — Q3 forecast” and draft loan covenant waivers were accessed; while undisclosed, these items may materially affect the price of our securities if publicly released, and we will notify the exchange.

must_not_detect.reason: Negated sensitive data; not actually processed

uncertain.reason: Direct identifier for a person but not covered by an explicit allowed PII rule; treated as quasi-identifier.
May be a contact identifier tied to an individual but not clearly covered by the allowed rules.
IP-like value but partially redacted and not linked to a person; unclear if it should be labeled under ip_address.
Could reference a financing facility potentially tied to MNPI but not an allowed rule like definitive_agreement or transaction_codename.
Market microstructure term; may relate to disclosure/blackout concepts but not clearly within allowed MNPI markers.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: TH Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. TH Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking; ideal_must_detect remains a broader gap-discovery tier, not a locked recall baseline.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: TH Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
